query:
SELECT rb.id, rb.subscriberName, rb.customerExternalId, rb.hasHardware, rb.hasVoip, rb.hasSupport, rb.isByod,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rci.slotType, ':', rci.monthlyCostExGst) ORDER BY rci.slotType SEPARATOR ', ') AS inputs
FROM retail_bundles rb
JOIN retail_bundle_cost_inputs rci ON rci.bundleId = rb.id
WHERE rb.isActive = 1 AND rb.hasHardware = 1 AND rb.hasVoip = 1 AND rb.isByod = 0
GROUP BY rb.id
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT rb.id, rb.subscriberName, rb.customerExternalId, rb.hasHardware, rb.hasVoip, rb.hasSupport, rb.isByod,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rci.slotType, ':', rci.monthlyCostExGst) ORDER BY rci.slotType SEPARATOR ', ') AS inputs
FROM retail_bundles rb
JOIN retail_bundle_cost_inputs rci ON rci.bundleId = rb.id
WHERE rb.isActive = 1 AND rb.hasHardware = 1 AND rb.hasVoip = 1 AND rb.isByod = 0
GROUP BY rb.id
LIMIT 5
